Provenance.description:
Tracks how artifact content was produced and its review state.

This is central to APLH's knowledge governance: every piece of content
must declare its origin and confidence level so that reviewers can
assess trustworthiness.

source_refs.description: List of source document references (document IDs, URLs, etc.)
source_refs.title: Source Refs

method.description: Description of the production method (e.g., 'extracted by Gemini 3.1 Pro from CCAR-33 §33.28')
method.title: Method

reviewed_by.description: Reviewer identity (empty if not yet reviewed)
reviewed_by.title: Reviewed By

review_date.description: ISO date of review (empty if not yet reviewed)
review_date.title: Review Date

Provenance.title: Provenance

ProvenanceSourceType.description: How the artifact content was produced.
ProvenanceSourceType.title: ProvenanceSourceType

description: Abnormal/failure condition description for propulsion control logic.

detection_logic.description: How this abnormal condition is detected (logic description, not code)
detection_logic.title: Detection Logic

entry_conditions.description: Conditions under which this abnormal is declared active
entry_conditions.title: Entry Conditions

system_effect.description: Effect on the propulsion system if this abnormal occurs
system_effect.title: System Effect

crew_effect.description: Effect visible to the flight crew (alerts, annunciations, performance changes)
crew_effect.title: Crew Effect

fallback_mode.description: Degraded operating mode entered upon detection
fallback_mode.title: Fallback Mode

recovery_conditions.description: Conditions under which the system can exit this abnormal state
recovery_conditions.title: Recovery Conditions

related_requirements.description: REQ-xxxx IDs related to this abnormal condition
related_requirements.title: Related Requirements

related_functions.description: FUNC-xxxx IDs of functions involved in handling this abnormal
related_functions.title: Related Functions

related_interfaces.description: IFACE-xxxx IDs of interfaces affected by this abnormal
related_interfaces.title: Related Interfaces

severity_hint.description: Severity guidance (e.g., 'minor', 'major', 'hazardous', 'catastrophic'). Note: This is a working classification, not a formal safety assessment.
severity_hint.title: Severity Hint

related_modes.description: MODE-xxxx IDs of modes affected by this abnormal condition
related_modes.title: Related Modes

related_transitions.description: TRANS-xxxx IDs of transitions triggered by this abnormal condition
related_transitions.title: Related Transitions

title: Abnormal
